Why Swedish Walls

Everything You Need,
Nothing You Don't

We built Swedish Walls for people who value clarity — clear pricing, quality environments, and zero compromises.

  • All-inclusive pricing
    One flat monthly fee covers electricity, water, internet, and amenities. No hidden costs, ever.
  • Premium community
    Surrounded by professionals, entrepreneurs, and creatives in a vibrant shared environment.
  • Two prime locations
    Offices in Colombo 05 — the heart of the city's business district. Hostel in Katunayaka — ideal for airport access and short stays.
  • Ready from day one
    Fully furnished, high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning — everything set up before you arrive.

"I've been working here for a while, and it's honestly one of the best co-working spaces around. The service is great, the ambience is super comfy and cozy yet spacious, with a really pleasant and friendly vibe all around. It's the kind of place that makes you actually enjoy getting work done. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for a productive and relaxed workspace!"
